display_name.description: A user-assigned name for this group, used only for display purposes.

filter.description: The filter used to determine which monitored resources belong to this group.

parent_name.description: The name of the group's parent, if it has one. The format is "projects/{project_id_or_number}/groups/{group_id}". For groups with no parent, parentName is the empty string, "".

is_cluster.description: If true, the members of this group are considered to be a cluster. The system can perform additional analysis on groups that are clusters.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
